entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING
PATCHY FOG AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
PATCHY FOG IN THE MORNING
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CALM WINDS, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS AROUND 90
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 70

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
